task_completion.description: Load the Exam Anxiety dataset into Jamovi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window is open and displays the 'ExamAnxiety' dataset with columns like 'Exam', 'Revise', and 'Anxiety'.

task_completion.description: Perform linear regression with the specified variables
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi analysis panel shows a Linear Regression setup with 'Exam' in the Dependent Variable box and 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' in the Covariates box.

task_completion.description: Generate predicted values and residuals to identify the outlier
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi data spreadsheet shows newly created columns for Predicted values and Residuals, or the analysis options show that 'Save' -> 'Predicted values' and 'Residuals' are checked.

task_completion.description: Save the Jamovi project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager shows the file 'Exam_Outlier_Analysis.omv' being saved or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/' directory.

task_completion.description: Record the outlier's details in the text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the contents of 'outlier_student.txt' containing Student_Code: 17, Actual_Exam: 95, Predicted_Exam: ~54.44, and Residual: ~40.56.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi graphical interface (menus, dialogs, analysis panels) rather than running a Python/R script in the terminal to get the answers.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the text file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal commands (echo, cat) being used to write the outlier details to 'outlier_student.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent derived the answer from the software rather than hallucinating
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent can be seen sorting the residuals column in Jamovi or visually inspecting the data to find the maximum positive residual before writing it to the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct outlier is Student Code 17. Actual Exam: 95, Predicted: 54.44 (accept slight rounding variations), Residual: 40.56 (accept slight rounding variations). The project must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Exam_Outlier_Analysis.omv and the report as /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/outlier_student.txt.
